name: Nihon Falcom
description: Japanese developer known for foundational computer and console RPG series, especially Dragon Slayer, Ys, and The Legend of Heroes.

eras.title: Japanese Computer RPG Era
eras.description: Falcom helps define Japanese computer RPGs through Dragon Slayer, Ys, and early Legend of Heroes titles.

eras.title: Modern Falcom RPG Era
eras.description: The studio becomes strongly associated with modern Ys and Trails releases.
